# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd
---
apiVersion: "security.istio.io/v1beta1"
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: linkerd-gateway-outbound
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: DENY
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      service: linkerd-gateway
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nginx
spec:
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        k8s_cluster: true
    to: 
    - operation:
        methods: ["POST"]
---
apiVersion: "security.istio.io/v1beta1"
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: linkerd-gateway-inbound-to-service-mesh
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      service: linkerd
---
apiVersion: "security.istio.io/v1beta1"
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: linkerd-gateway-inbound-to-service-mesh2
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nginx
---
apiVersion: "security.istio.io/v1beta1"
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: linkerd-gateway-inbound-to-service-mesh3
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: envoy
